meta_title: For Students: user onboarding to Solve can't debug code (Advanced Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome can't debug code. A Advanced-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Master Debugging: User Onboarding for Student AI Projects
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with cryptic bugs. Learn to implement advanced user onboarding flows using Antigravity and Claude Code to build robust, scalable AI apps.
content.answer_block: Debugging failures often stem from poor state management during user onboarding. By implementing structured, event-driven onboarding flows, you isolate logic errors, capture telemetry, and provide clear feedback loops. Use Antigravity to architect the flow and Claude Code to automate the refactoring, turning unmanageable spaghetti code into a modular, production-ready system.
content.intro:
The screen flickers. Your terminal spits out an indecipherable stack trace, and your latest feature—the one you promised your portfolio—is dead on arrival. You're trapped in the ‘debugging loop,’ staring at code that refuses to cooperate, while the clock ticks down on your project deadline. This isn't just a syntax error; it's a systemic failure in how your application manages user states.

But here is the secret: top-tier engineers don't just 'fix' bugs; they design their way out of them. By re-architecting your user onboarding process, you force your application to handle data flow with precision. This tutorial shifts you from a frustrated coder to a system architect, utilizing the power of Antigravity and Claude Code to turn your onboarding flow into your most reliable, bug-free asset.

steps.title: Architecting State Machines
steps.description: Before writing code, define the onboarding flow as a finite state machine. This prevents logic leaks that cause hidden bugs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a state machine definition for a SaaS onboarding flow (Sign-up, Email Verification, Profile Setup, Feature Tour). Include transition rules and error handling states.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Generate the state machine logic in src/onboarding/machine.ts based on the provided requirements.'

steps.title: Implementing Event-Driven Hooks
steps.description: Decouple your onboarding logic from the UI to ensure debugging becomes a simple matter of inspecting event logs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design an event emitter pattern for tracking onboarding steps. Ensure every step transition triggers a loggable event.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit src/onboarding/hooks.ts --apply 'Implement the event emitter pattern as per Antigravity design.'

steps.title: Automating Edge Case Testing
steps.description: Use Claude Code to generate unit tests that simulate interrupted onboarding sessions, the primary source of 'un-debuggable' errors.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a test suite for the onboarding state machine that simulates user abandonment and network timeouts.

steps.title: Integrating Telemetry Middleware
steps.description: Inject middleware that captures the application state at the moment of failure, making debugging trivial.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a middleware function that snapshots the onboarding state context whenever an error is thrown.

steps.title: Refactoring for Readability
steps.description: Use Claude Code to clean up the implementation, ensuring the codebase is modular enough for future scaling.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the onboarding implementation and suggest refactors to improve maintainability and readability for a student-level project.

pro_tips: Always log the 'previous state' alongside the 'current state' in your onboarding transition logs.
Use a 'dead-man's switch' in your onboarding flow to reset user progress if they remain idle for more than 10 minutes.
Never hardcode onboarding strings; move them to a JSON config file to allow for instant UX updates without redeploying code.
Test your onboarding flow in 'Slow Network' mode within Chrome DevTools to catch race conditions early.
Use Claude Code to generate documentation for your onboarding flow automatically whenever you update the state machine.
content.next_steps: Now that your onboarding is bulletproof, start building your core feature set, leveraging the same state-machine pattern to ensure your entire app remains debuggable and clean.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools and the methodology to stop fighting your code and start architecting your success. This is the difference between a project that stalls and a product that scales. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
